请使用网页小工具栏[Base64储存文件](../File64.html)工具解码获取tdl_gui.py
```json
{
  "version": "1.1",
  "createdAt": "2026-04-25T09:23:52.127Z",
  "compressionSupported": true,
  "files": [
    {
      "name": "tdl_gui.py",
      "extension": "py",
      "type": "text/x-python",
      "size": 55152,
      "lastModified": 1775444941683,
      "encoding": "base64",
      "compression": "gzip",
      "compressedSize": 12623,
      "data": ""
    }
  ]
}
```
